threat_description: Unauthorized actor gains or reuses developer or pipeline credentials to impersonate legitimate provisioning.
mitigation: Enforce strong MFA on developer accounts and CI/CD pipelines; rotate service principal keys; use managed identities.

threat_description: Actions taken by developers or pipeline processes are not adequately logged, allowing repudiation of administrative changes.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable immutable, centralized audit logs for all Terraform and local-exec operations; correlate events to identities.

threat_description: Attacker spoofs legitimate client requests (e.g., forged JWTs or session tokens) to access function APIs.
mitigation: Validate and verify JWT tokens server-side; implement token expiration and audience restrictions; enable OAuth scopes.

threat_description: Lack of non-repudiation on API calls allows malicious clients to deny their actions or evade accountability.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Implement request logging with immutable IDs, timestamps, and origin metadata; integrate WAF or API gateway logs.

threat_description: Malicious or rogue provider plugin impersonates legitimate AzureRM provider to intercept credentials.
mitigation: Verify plugin signatures; restrict plugin sources; use signed modules from trusted registry.

threat_description: State file (.tfstate) or plan files tampered in transit or at rest altering resource definitions.
mitigation: Encrypt state at rest with managed keys; use secure remote state backend; enable versioning.

threat_description: User denies having applied specific changes and no audit trail is available to prove execution.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable audit logging for Terraform operations; sign plans and enforce review workflows.

threat_description: Sensitive variables (e.g., admin_password, connection strings) exposed in logs or local cache.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Mask sensitive output; use variable encryption; configure Terraform sanitization flags.

threat_description: Resource creation or plan execution stalled or crashed under heavy load causing DoS for provisioning.
mitigation: Limit parallelism; monitor resource usage; use CI/CD rate limits and retries.

threat_description: Local provisioner runs escalate privileges by invoking scripts with elevated rights.
mitigation: Run provisioners under least-privilege identity; audit local-exec scripts; avoid privileged operations.

threat_description: Attacker spoofs service plan identity to bind malicious apps and intercept traffic.
mitigation: Use managed identities with RBAC; restrict service principal assignments; audit role bindings.

threat_description: Configuration settings of the plan tampered, enabling unsupported features or weaker isolation.
mitigation: Enforce policy guardrails (Azure Policy); lock critical resources; limit contributor scope.

threat_description: Operator denies having changed scaling or platform settings, leading to confusion in incident response.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable Activity Logs; enforce retention and immutability for App Service diagnostics logs.

threat_description: Plan metrics (CPU/memory) or logs inadvertently expose subscription or app details.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Restrict diagnostic log access; use private endpoints for Kudu/API; encrypt log storage.

threat_description: Overloading the plan with too many apps or requests causes DoS for hosted function apps.
mitigation: Implement scaling limits; configure request quotas and alerts; isolate high-traffic apps.

threat_description: Compromise of App Service Plan permissions allows escalation to full resource group control.
mitigation: Grant only minimal roles (e.g., Web Plan Contributor); use PIM for elevation; monitor RBAC changes.

threat_description: Attacker forges function app identity or certificate to call internal APIs.
mitigation: Enable App Service Authentication with AAD; enforce mTLS for internal calls.

threat_description: Deployment package or environment variables tampered to inject malicious code or keys.
mitre_atlas: T1222: File and Directory Permissions Modification
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use SAS tokens with read-only for package; validate package checksum; restrict App Settings edits.

threat_description: Developer or attacker denies CRUD operations against function app settings.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable diagnostic logs and App Service HTTP logs; send to SIEM with immutable retention.

threat_description: App Settings or secrets (COSMOS key, STORAGE conn) inadvertently exposed through misconfigured Kudu or FTP.
mitigation: Disable FTP; restrict Kudu endpoint; enable private endpoint and IP restrictions.

threat_description: Flooding the function endpoint with high request volume leads to cold-start delays or throttling.
mitigation: Enable API throttling in API Management or WAF; implement retry/backoff; use premium plan.

threat_description: Misuse of function-managed identity or code vulnerability to gain contributor access on CosmosDB.
mitigation: Assign least-privilege roles to managed identity; monitor identity usage; enforce RBAC separation.

threat_description: Attacker spoofs the front-end host to deliver malicious scripts to clients.
mitigation: Enable custom domain HTTPS with certificate pinning; validate Host header; use WAF.

threat_description: Deployed React bundle tampered to inject malware or exfiltration code.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Validate package integrity via checksums; restrict blob write permissions; enable CI/CD signing.

threat_description: No trace of front-end deployments or user file changes allows repudiation of malicious updates.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable deployment logs in App Service; write logs to immutable storage and SIEM.

threat_description: CORS wildcard on front-end exposes user credentials and tokens to malicious origins.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Restrict CORS origins to known domains; implement CSP; remove wildcard headers.

threat_description: High volume of static asset requests causes cold start delays or service throttling.
mitigation: Use CDN in front of static assets; enable caching; apply rate limiting in WAF.

threat_description: Exploit of Node package vulnerability to gain code execution within the service context.
mitigation: Keep runtime and libraries up to date; enable npm audit; use application sandboxing.

threat_description: SSH host key spoofing allows man-in-the-middle interception of credentials.
mitigation: Enable SSH certificate validation; pin host keys; restrict SSH to known IPs.

threat_description: Attacker who compromises SSH credentials modifies system binaries or scripts.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use image attestation and disk encryption; enforce OS-level file integrity monitoring.

threat_description: Lack of detailed audit logs on VM allows attacker to deny having executed malicious commands.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Deploy and configure VM agent to forward audit logs to SIEM; enable Azure Monitor logs.

threat_description: Sensitive data on VM (scripts, credentials) exposed to unauthorized users or services.
mitigation: Encrypt disks; remove credentials from disk; use Key Vault with managed identity.

threat_description: SSH brute-force attempts or resource exhaustion cause VM service unavailability.
mitigation: Restrict NSG to known IP ranges; enable SSH rate limiting; use SSH keys only.

threat_description: Exploit of kernel or SUID binary vulnerability to escalate privileges to root.
mitigation: Regularly patch OS; disable SUID binaries; use security baseline configurations.

threat_description: Malicious extension binary puppets as legitimate CustomScriptExtension to run rogue code.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Restrict extension publisher IDs; validate extension signatures; use CRP policies.

threat_description: Extension script payload in blob is tampered to include malicious commands.
mitigation: Use SAS with limited scope; sign scripts; enable storage encryption and firewall rules.

threat_description: Absence of logs for extension execution allows attacker to repudiate script actions.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable diagnostics on extensions; forward logs to Log Analytics with retention policies.

threat_description: Extension writes sensitive data or command output to unprotected storage.
mitigation: Encrypt outputs; restrict container ACL; scrub sensitive data from logs.

threat_description: Faulty or malicious extension script loops or crashes cause VM CPU/IO exhaustion.
mitigation: Validate script logic; limit execution time; monitor VM resource metrics.

threat_description: Extension runs with elevated context and can execute OS-level privilege escalation.
mitigation: Use least-privileged execution context; audit extension permission model; remove unnecessary rights.

threat_description: Attacker spoofs Automation Account identity to submit unauthorized runbooks.
mitigation: Limit identity assignments; require MFA for portal; audit identity usage.

threat_description: Automation Account configuration tampered to add malicious modules or connections.
mitigation: Lock account configuration via Azure Policy; enable resource locks.

threat_description: Lack of audit trail for Automation Account actions allows repudiation.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable Automation Account auditing; send logs to Log Analytics with retention.

threat_description: Credentials or assets in Automation Account (modules, certificates) exposed to attackers.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Use Key Vault for credentials; restrict runbook asset access; enforce HTTPS access.

threat_description: Flood of runbook executions exhausts Automation Account quota causing denial of service.
mitigation: Implement runbook execution limits; monitor job count; use throttling policies.

threat_description: Automation Account identity abused to elevate privileges in the subscription.
mitigation: Assign least-privilege role; use PIM for elevated roles; monitor RBAC changes.

threat_description: Attacker spoofs runbook identity to execute malicious scripts against Azure resources.
mitigation: Enforce managed identity constraints; restrict runbook assignments.

threat_description: Runbook code tampered in storage before execution injecting harmful commands.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Store runbooks in VC-backed repo; enable checksum verification; restrict storage write.

threat_description: Absence of tamper-proof logs for runbook schedule and execution leads to repudiation.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures

threat_description: Runbook outputs include secrets or keys leaked in cleartext.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Mask sensitive outputs; use secure variables from Key Vault; scrub logs.

threat_description: Long-running or looping runbook jobs exhaust quota causing DoS for other automations.
mitigation: Set job timeout; monitor runbook health; enforce retry policies.

threat_description: Runbook executes under high-privilege identity, enabling subscription-wide control abuse.
mitigation: Use least-privilege identity; separate roles for different runbooks; monitor identity activity.

threat_description: Unauthorized script invocation spoofs file-populate operation against database.
mitigation: Validate script origin; restrict execution to CI host; code-sign scripts.

threat_description: Local create-table.py script tampered to execute arbitrary DB commands.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Store scripts in VCS; verify checksums; restrict local modifications.

threat_description: Lack of logging on data population scripts allows developer to repudiate changes.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures

threat_description: Script outputs CosmosDB key in logs, leaking credentials.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Mask sensitive parameters; use environment variables securely; no plaintext logs.

threat_description: Script floods CosmosDB with repeated calls causing throughput exhaustion.
mitigation: Add rate-limiting; use SDK retries; monitor RU consumption.

threat_description: Script runs with admin credentials, enabling privilege escalation to subscription.
mitigation: Use least-privilege service principal; limit script credentials scope.

threat_description: Spoofed env_replace script injects malicious environment variables into code.
mitigation: Lock script files; verify integrity; store in secured repo.

threat_description: Configuration patcher tampered to insert wrong connection strings or keys.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures

threat_description: Lack of trace for env_replace execution leads to repudiation of environment changes.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures

threat_description: Patch process writes secrets into code comments or logs, exposing them.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account

threat_description: Faulty patch script crashes and prevents deployment, causing service disruption.
mitigation: Validate scripts before run; include unit tests; implement retries.

threat_description: Script runs under elevated user harming file system, escalating privileges.
mitigation: Run scripts under least-privilege account; containerize patch process.

threat_description: Malicious file_replacement_upload script spoofs asset references to exfil endpoints.
mitigation: Code-sign uploader; restrict execution host; review script logic.

threat_description: Upload process tampered to target wrong container or overwrite production assets.
mitigation: Use Azure Policy to restrict uploads; enable RBAC on containers.

threat_description: No audit of file uploads allows denial of malicious asset changes.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable storage analytics logs; correlate with script invocations.

threat_description: Upload leaks SAS or connection string in stdout or error logs.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Redact secrets from logs; use environment variables securely.

threat_description: Script overwhelms storage ingress with large uploads, causing DoS.
mitigation: Limit file size; enforce throttling; monitor container metrics.

threat_description: Uploader runs with high privileges, enabling system-level escalation.
mitigation: Run under least-privileged user; containerize upload step.

threat_description: Malicious clientid_replacement script spoofs client ID in runbook causing misattribution.
mitigation: Code-sign scripts; enforce script integrity checks; restrict execution hosts.

threat_description: Script is tampered to inject incorrect or malicious runbook parameters.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Store templates in VCS; verify checksum before execution.

threat_description: Lack of audit for clientid_replacement leads to repudiation of runbook identity changes.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Log patch events with user and timestamp; forward to SIEM.

threat_description: Script exposes client secret or IDs in console or logs, leaking credentials.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Mask secrets; use secure variables; scrub logs.

threat_description: Faulty script halts provisioning, causing deployment interruptions (DoS).
mitigation: Validate scripts; include error handling and retries.

threat_description: Spoofed VM IP replacement script injects wrong IP, misrouting SSH traffic.
mitigation: Verify script source; sign scripts; restrict execution environment.

threat_description: Tampering of config_update script causes sensitive data exposure or misconfiguration.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use version control; verify checksums; restrict write access to blobs.

threat_description: Absence of logs for IP injection leads to repudiation of network configuration changes.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable logging of blob updates and script runs; correlate with CI logs.

threat_description: Script prints VM IP or credentials in console, leaking to logs.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Remove secrets from output; use environment refs; secure logs.

threat_description: Script error prevents VM provisioning, causing operational DoS.
mitigation: Test scripts locally; implement retries and failure notifications.

threat_description: Random ID generator is spoofed to produce predictable identifiers.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use cryptographically secure random functions; avoid custom implementations.

threat_description: Tampering with random generator library yields collisions or weak IDs.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures

threat_description: Lack of tamper log means rogue modifications go undetected.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Enable provider audit logs; monitor changes to provider binaries.

threat_description: Attacker spoofs NIC association process to bind wrong NSG allowing open ports.

threat_description: Tampering with association script misconfigures NSG, enabling unauthorized traffic.

threat_description: No log of NSG binding changes allows repudiation of security rule updates.

threat_description: Exposure of NIC or NSG IDs in outputs leaks network topology information.

threat_description: Failed or delayed binding due to errors causes network connectivity issues (DoS).

threat_description: Malicious alteration of DB account settings compromises regional failover or consistency.

threat_description: Lack of replication audit allows denial of unauthorized changes to Geo-replication ( repudiation).

threat_description: Primary key exposed through misconfigured firewall or network rule.

threat_description: Massive ingestion/deletion requests exhaust request units causing DoS.

threat_description: No audit of container-level operations allows repudiation of malicious uploads or deletes.

threat_description: Burst reads/writes to container saturate storage account causing DoS.

threat_description: ACL changes grant unintended write access to production container.

threat_description: No logs of prod container operations allows repudiation of asset modifications.

threat_description: Absence of dev container audit logs leads to repudiation of unauthorized changes.

threat_description: Dev artifacts exposed publicly due to misconfiguration.

threat_description: No audit logging of VM container changes allows repudiation.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures

threat_description: Exposure of VM scripts to public due to misconfigured container.

threat_description: Large VM script downloads or faulty code cause storage throttling (DoS).

threat_description: Blob package tampered to include malicious code binaries.

threat_description: Missing blob-level audit allows repudiation of code package changes.

threat_description: Front-end blob tampered to serve malicious scripts to clients.

threat_description: Absence of front-end blob logs allows repudiation of asset updates.

threat_description: Front-end blob downloads overwhelm storage causing client-facing DoS.

threat_description: Static asset blob tampered to inject malicious content.

threat_description: No logs for app_files_prod allows repudiation of malicious asset changes.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures

threat_description: Dev asset blob tampered to include unauthorized or malicious content.

mitigation: Validate checksums; restrict write permissions; sign assets.

threat_description: Missing audit logs for dev asset changes allows repudiation of uploads.

threat_description: Identity client ID or principal ID exposed reveals credential for misuse.
mitigation: Restrict output values; avoid exposing identity metadata.

threat_description: High demand for tokens exhausts identity quotas causing DoS for dependent services.
mitigation: Monitor token requests; implement caching; distribute token load.

threat_description: Runbook file tampered locally injecting malicious commands.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Store in Git; enforce code reviews; verify checksum.

threat_description: No log of local file modifications allows repudiation of runbook edits.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A09: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
mitigation: Use version control with immutable history; enable audit logs.

threat_description: Local file content exposed in CI logs reveals client ID or resource group.
mitigation: Mask sensitive fields; secure log collection; remove secrets from files.

threat_description: Large local file reads or processing cause CI job failures (DoS).
mitigation: Validate runbook size; split large files; optimize file handling.

threat_description: Build artifacts or commands tampered in-flight injecting malicious code.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use encrypted channels (HTTPS/SSH); sign artifacts; verify commit hashes.

threat_description: Sensitive variable values exposed in CI logs or network packets.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Mask secrets; use secure variables; enforce TLS.

threat_description: Excessive CI requests overwhelm Terraform Engine causing provisioning delays.
mitigation: Throttle CI triggers; rate limit API calls; monitor job queue.

threat_description: API calls tampered en route altering resource definitions.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Enforce HTTPS/TLS; validate certificates; use private endpoints.

threat_description: Credentials or tokens exposed in transit via network sniffing.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Use TLS 1.2+; enforce mutual auth; rotate credentials.

threat_description: High-frequency API calls cause ARM throttling or service unavailability (DoS).
mitigation: Implement exponential backoff; respect Azure API rate limits; monitor calls.

threat_description: Database commands modified in transit leading to destructive operations.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use encrypted SDK connections; validate endpoint certificates.

threat_description: CosmosDB keys or data intercepted over network revealing credentials or PII.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Enforce TLS; use VNet service endpoint; rotate keys.

threat_description: Flood of create-table operations exhausts RUs causing database DoS.
mitigation: Throttle script calls; use SDK retry; monitor RU usage.

threat_description: Patched configuration intercepted and modified injecting malicious settings.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use local file system; apply file signature checks.

threat_description: Connection strings exposed in transit if pushed to remote repo without encryption.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Encrypt environment files; store in Key Vault; mask in logs.

threat_description: Erroneous patch flood causes repeated deployments or failures (DoS).
mitigation: Validate patch logic; implement backoff; monitor failures.

threat_description: Archive contents tampered before upload injecting malicious code.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Validate archive checksum; sign artifacts; use TLS.

threat_description: Archive file metadata or content leaked exposing file paths or secrets.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Encrypt archives; remove secrets before packaging.

threat_description: High volume archive uploads overload blob service causing DoS.
mitigation: Throttle uploads; monitor metrics; use retries.

threat_description: Blob content tampered in transit injecting malicious runtime code.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use HTTPS; validate blob checksum at runtime.

threat_description: SAS URL intercepted exposing package to unauthorized parties.
mitigation: Use short-lived SAS; prefer managed identity storage mounts.

threat_description: Excessive cold-start package fetches degrade function availability (DoS).
mitigation: Use pre-warmed instances; cache package in memory.

threat_description: Database queries modified in transit causing unauthorized data changes.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Enable encryption in transit; validate server certificates.

threat_description: CosmosDB key in API request header exposed over network revealing credentials.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Use managed identity for DB access; remove keys from config.

threat_description: Flood of API calls exhausts RU capacity causing DB DoS.
mitigation: Implement request rate-limiting; use caching; monitor RU metrics.

threat_description: Blob operations tampered to delete or overwrite data.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use lease mechanism; enforce TLS; validate responses.

threat_description: Storage connection string intercepted exposing full access rights.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Use managed identity; remove connection strings from code.

threat_description: Excessive blob operations cause storage throttling or DoS.
mitigation: Implement server-side throttling; monitor metrics; apply quotas.

threat_description: Upload requests altered to target unexpected containers or files.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use SAS with precise scope; validate target URIs.

threat_description: SAS token or connection string leaked during upload revealing container access.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Mask secrets; use environment variables; secure logs.

threat_description: High-frequency uploads saturate storage ingress causing DoS.
mitigation: Throttle uploads; monitor storage metrics.

threat_description: Static asset responses altered in transit serving malicious content.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Enforce HTTPS with HSTS; use CDN signed URLs.

threat_description: Public endpoints allow eavesdropping on asset URLs and usage patterns.
mitigation: Use HTTPS; limit referrer; remove query strings from cache.

threat_description: Surge of client requests for assets overloads storage causing DoS.
mitigation: Use CDN; enable caching; rate limit in WAF.

threat_description: HTTP requests manipulated to inject XSS or malicious payloads.
mitigation: Validate and sanitize input; use WAF; implement CSP.

threat_description: Sensitive token or cookie exposed over unencrypted channel.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Enforce HTTPS; secure cookie flags; HSTS.

threat_description: Spoofed client floods requests exhausting front-end capacity (DoS).
mitigation: Enable rate limiting; use CDN; monitor WAF alerts.

threat_description: API calls modified in transit leading to unauthorized operations.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Enforce TLS; validate signatures; use token-based auth.

threat_description: Sensitive user data in API response exposed over insecure connection.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Use HTTPS; enable encryption in transit; secure headers.

threat_description: Malicious clients pump API with requests causing backend DoS.
mitigation: Implement API throttling; use API Management; monitor usage.

threat_description: Asset fetch requests tampered to exfiltrate or overwrite other blobs.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use SAS with read-only; validate blob paths.

threat_description: Front-end connection strings intercepted exposing storage account access.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Use managed identity; avoid connection strings in code.

threat_description: Surge of asset reads overwhelms storage causing DoS.
mitigation: Implement caching; use CDN; monitor metrics.

threat_description: Extension payload in transit tampered to run malicious commands on VM.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use secure blob endpoints; enable HTTPS; sign scripts.

threat_description: Extension parameters or secrets leaked during transfer to VM.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Encrypt extension payload; use Key Vault; restrict access.

threat_description: Rapid extension executions degrade VM performance causing DoS.
mitigation: Limit extension frequency; monitor VM metrics.

threat_description: Blob fetch requests from VM tampered to access unauthorized containers.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use SAS with limited scope; validate container URIs.

threat_description: SAS token in VM intercepted allowing unauthorized blob access.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Use managed identity for storage; remove SAS from VM.

threat_description: Script downloads flood storage causing DoS.
mitigation: Cache scripts locally; schedule downloads; monitor metrics.

threat_description: Runbook API calls tampered to operate on wrong resources.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use HTTPS; validate target resource IDs; enforce parameter checks.

threat_description: Runbook credentials or tokens leaked to network capturing mailformed requests.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Use managed identity for runbook; avoid storing secrets; rotate tokens.

threat_description: Runbook floods ARM with listVM calls causing subscription API throttling (DoS).
mitigation: Implement pagination; add delays; monitor job executions.

threat_description: Patched runbook file tampered mid-transfer injecting malicious commands.
owasp_top_10_for_llm: A08: Software and Data Integrity Failures
mitigation: Use secure local paths; verify file signatures.

threat_description: Runbook file content or client ID exposed in local logs revealing credentials.
mitre_atlas: T1537: Transfer Data to Cloud Account
mitigation: Mask sensitive values; secure CI logs; use environment variables.

threat_description: Repeated patch attempts create local file locks preventing runbook execution (DoS).
mitigation: Handle file locks gracefully; include retry logic; monitor failures.
